title: salix × litigiosa
intro: Salix × litigiosa, also known as hybrid willow, is a plant species that is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the goosely willow (Salix × fragilis). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which are attributed to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × litigiosa include relieving pain and reducing fever, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
